name: Temporal Bone CT
description: CT of the temporal bone for otic capsule and middle ear evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the temporal bones without contrast was performed.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Middle Ear
sections.content: Middle ear spaces [are aerated / no fluid / no mass]. Ossicles are [intact / normal].

sections.name: Inner Ear
sections.content: Cochlea [has normal morphology / turns are intact]. Vestibule and semicircular canals [are normal].

sections.name: Mastoid
sections.content: Mastoid air cells [are aerated / clear / no disease]. No cholesteatoma identified.

sections.name: EAC
sections.content: External auditory canal [is patent / no stenosis / no mass].

impression:
1. Normal temporal bone CT.
2. No evidence of ear pathology.
